sentences.arabic: لَاحَظَتْ سَلْمَى أَنَّ زَهْرَتَهَا نَمَتْ كَثِيرًا فَجْأَةً.
sentences.translation: Salma je primijetila da je njen cvijet iznenada mnogo porastao.
sentences.translationEn: Salma noticed that her flower had suddenly grown a lot.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تَسْقِيهَا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ لَكِنَّهَا لَمْ تَنْمُ بِهَذَا السُّرْعَةِ مِنْ قَبْلُ.
sentences.translation: Zalijevala ga je svaki dan ali nikada prije nije rastao ovakvom brzinom.
sentences.translationEn: She watered it every day but it had never grown this fast before.
She asked her father about the reason.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْأَبُ: وَضَعْتُ سَمَادًا جَدِيدًا فِي التُّرْبَةِ أَمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je rekao: Juče sam stavio novo gnojivo u zemlju.
sentences.translationEn: The father said: I put new fertiliser in the soil yesterday.

sentences.translation: Salma je shvatila tajnu i zahvalila se ocu.
sentences.translationEn: Salma understood the secret and thanked her father.
